svg.text: MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION · SECURITY BY ISOLATION · LOCAL + CLOUD INFERENCE

g.text: Monitors agents · Writes rules · Delegates never executes · Sees everything
User-facing coordinator. Delegates to directors. Synthesizes reports.
extraction. Cannot touch code or infra.
Doesn't know WHY — just the WHAT.
No code exec, no web, no email.
8 Domain-Locked Agents · Local + Cloud Inference · Security by Isolation
